LocalStorageItem.title: LocalStorageItem
LocalStorageItem.description: A single key-value entry representing synced local storage.

value.description: The stringified JSON payload stored in local storage.

updatedAt.description: Epoch timestamp of when this item was written.

clientId.description: Unique identifier for the browser tab/client session to prevent echoing.

local_storage/{key}.description: Real-time sync table mapping localStorage keys to values.
